33.13.1 *Daphne*

Brochi 1,5–3,0 µm; exine 2,5–4,5 µm; poriën 1–2 µm.

22,0–34,3 µm, MiW 30,2 µm; 50 PK, 0a

*Daphne laureola* L. (3)
30,8–38,0 µm, MiW 34,4 µm; 51 PK, 0a

*Daphne mezereum* L. (3)
25,3–32,0 µm, MiW 29,4 µm; 50 PK, Oa

25,0–31,5 µm, MiW 29,9 µm; 50 PK, Oa
